name: @memberjunction/ai-bridge-ringcentral
description: MemberJunction: RingCentral Realtime Bridge driver (telephony). Connects the realtime agent engine to a phone call over the RingCentral Voice / Call Control API — outbound dial (RingOut / Call Control sessions), inbound webhook routing, single-party audio in/out, DTMF send/receive, and call transfer (supervise/transfer) — via an injectable telephony call SDK seam. Audio only: no video, no screen, no Meeting Controls.
author: MemberJunction.com
//optionalDependencies: @ringcentral/sdk is an OPTIONAL PEER SDK (CLAUDE rule 8, category 2): the package never statically imports it. Production wires RealRingCentralBindings over the real @ringcentral/sdk Call Control REST client + a media stream through the injected IRingCentralCallControlLike/IRingCentralMediaPump surfaces, so the package builds and unit-tests with no @ringcentral/sdk install and no network. Loaded only when the RingCentral provider is configured at deployment.
